arts.ttl: Chelsea star fires Amorim message as Maresca eyes another Man City reunion
arts.sum: football.london says: "Liam Delap would be a superb signing for Chelsea. So, with that being said, football.london has rounded up the latest Chelsea news and transfer gossip.

arts.ttl: Joe Cole insists Leicester midfielder Wilfred Ndidi should have been sent off for 'terrible tackle' on Cole Palmer during Chelsea clash
arts.sum: Palmer was left in agony eight minutes later after a high tackle from Ndidi caught his achilles, with Nigerian midfielder cautioned with a yellow card.

arts.ttl: Leicester to compete with Newcastle and West Ham for £17m-rated attacker
arts.sum: Leicester City are reportedly keen on signing Ibrahim Maza from Hertha Berlin. As per reports, the attacker is valued at around £17 million and the Foxes are hoping to get a deal done in the coming months. They will face competition from Newcastle United and West Ham United. It remains to be seen whether they […] The post Leicester to compete with Newcastle and West Ham for £17m-rated attacker appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: How Leicester fans reacted to Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall's return during match vs Chelsea - journalist
arts.sum: There’s plenty of reunions at the weekend for Chelsea’s trip to Leicester City at the King Power Stadium. The Blues’ first game back after the...

arts.ttl: Why Noni Madueke goal was ruled out as Chelsea star points finger at teammate vs Leicester
arts.sum: Madueke himself was not offside, having steered in the goal from inside the box following a cutback. There were plenty of other chances for Maresca's side and they thought they had gone 2-0 up in the 32nd minute when Noni Madueke fired home from inside the box.

arts.ttl: Steve Cooper's injury nightmare continues as Leicester City star forced off against Chelsea
arts.sum: Leicester City midfielder Harry Winks was forced off inside 10 minutes of Saturday afternoon's Premier League clash with Chelsea to pile more injury misery onto Steve Cooper. Fatawu's absence led to Kasey McAteer being handed his first Premier League start against Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Follow LIVE: Chelsea travel to Leicester looking to close gap on leaders
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca's third-placed Chelsea side head northwards to Leicester, who will be hoping to put more distance between themselves and the relegation zone.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca confirms why Pedro Neto is absent from Chelsea's squad vs Leicester

arts.ttl: Chelsea hoping to capitalise on another Man City transfer call to land next Cole Palmer
arts.sum: Chelsea are considering a swoop for Liam Delap - who is the latest young player to thrive after leaving Manchester City - with the striker impressing at Ipswich
